---
title: "Title"
author: "Janis Sonnemann"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output:
  html_document:
    toc: yes
    toc_float: true
    code_folding: hide
  pdf_document:
    toc: yes
    toc_depth: 3
editor_options: 
  
  chunk_output_type: console
knit: (function(input, ...) {
      ),
      output_format = "all",
      envir = globalenv()
      )
    rmarkdown::render(
      input,
      output_dir = paste0("doc/output/XXX"),
      output_file = paste0(
        xfun::sans_ext(input), '-', Sys.Date()
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
# Before start:
## in knit: output_dir replace XXX with short name for subdirectory
## in opts_chunk below replace XXX with same name

librarian::shelf(tidyverse)

knitr::opts_chunk$set(fig.path = paste0("output/XXX/figs/", Sys.Date(),"-"), dev = "png", 
                      warning = FALSE,
                      # hides code in pdf file
                      echo = knitr::is_html_output())
```
